calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2006 Continued To Jan-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-30-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Arnold W. Evje, II for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Melissa A. Bray, General Manager of property located at 540 Jones Street and employee of Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Michael Duguay, Desk Clerk at the Hotel.
No appearance by the Defendant: Andrew Hawthorne
EXH. 1 - 3 Day Notice to Quit-------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows: Restitution and Possession of Property located at 540 Jones St., #202, San Francisco, CA 94102. Forfeiture of the Rental Agreement and Costs in the amount of $151.30.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court
